title: This channel is intended for international publicity

replies.msg:
make a good use of this space, shitposting elsewhere
not bounded by English, do AMA in Japanese, Korean, or whatever the fuck language for foreigners to understand more about our thoughts
be aware of 30-cents ccp net-army as well, this channel is a double-sided blade for them to send misleading info
plz be reminded abt the seriousness of the channel
Push!
Ya right
Support!

btw plz increase character space for post topic
short af for Eng characters

ama just an example
